title: Standard Room
description: A cozy room with all the essentials for a comfortable stay.

title: Deluxe Room
description: Spacious room with a king-size bed and a stunning city view.

title: Superior Suite
description: Elegant suite with a separate living area and premium amenities.

title: Junior Suite
description: A bright and airy suite with a private balcony overlooking the garden.

title: Penthouse Suite
description: The pinnacle of luxury — panoramic views, a private terrace and butler service.

title: Family Room
description: Generously sized room designed for families, with two queen beds and a play corner.
